## Summary
- What does this change do?

## Testing
- How was this tested?

## Checklist
- [ ] I ran the relevant tests or explained why I could not.
- [ ] I did not commit real Floatplane session data, storage-state files, browser profiles, HAR captures, or other sensitive artifacts.
- [ ] I kept the app local-only by default and did not widen network exposure.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior or setup changed.
